description_html:
Spotlight is a solo dance competition conducted as part of SAMGATHA Fest, giving dancers a platform to showcase their talent, expression, and stage presence.

Number of Rounds:

  • 2 Rounds

Round 1: Prelims (Online):

  • Participants must submit a dance performance video of 1–2 minutes during registration.
  • This round will be evaluated online.

Round 2: Finals (Offline):

  • Shortlisted participants will perform live on stage.
  • Performance duration: 3–5 minutes.
  • Participants may perform to any song(s) of their choice.
  • The final round will be conducted during the Savara Fest.

Qualification & Communication:

  • Participants qualified for the final round will be notified via email or WhatsApp before the fest.
  • Qualified participants will be given a designated time slot for their performance.
  • Failure to perform at the allotted time will result in disqualification.

Important Guidelines & Notes:

  • A valid event/fest pass is mandatory to participate and perform.
  • No props or costumes will be provided by the institute.
  • The time limit includes prop setup on stage.
  • Participants must not spoil the stage or exceed the allotted time.
  • The institute is not responsible for any issues with audio files.
  • Participants must arrive on time for the offline round.

Disqualification:

  • Exceeding the time limit
  • Not reporting at the assigned performance slot
  • Failure to follow stage or event guidelines
